title: Carex Original Shower Gel for All Skin Types, Effectively Cleanses and Protects Your Skin, 100% Soap Free, 500ml (Pack of 6)
features: Effective Cleansing: Thoroughly cleanses and protects your skin, maintaining its natural moisture balance.
Fresh Fragrance: Features a lovely fresh fragrance, perfect for both men and women.
100% Soap Free: Formulated without soap to ensure your skin retains its natural moisture.
Dermatologist Tested: Approved by expert dermatologists and accredited by the Skin Health Alliance for safe and effective use.
Bulk Pack: Comes in a large 500ml bottle in 6 Pack, offering a long-lasting supply.
description: Product Description Carex Original Shower Gel (Pack of 6 x 500ml) is a refreshing, soap-free body wash that effectively cleanses and protects your skin. Designed for all skin types, its gentle yet powerful formula removes dirt and bacteria while maintaining the skin’s natural moisture balance. The rich, foamy lather provides a deep clean without causing dryness, making it perfect for daily use. With a bulk pack of six bottles, this shower gel is a convenient and cost-effective choice for families, shared households, or long-term use. Experience fresh, healthy skin with Carex Original Shower Gel. Directions For more information, please see the packaging. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Avoid contact with natural stone surfaces and stainless steel. May cause staining. See more
